reviews.review_title: Shame if something happened to it.
reviews.review_description: Nice little universe of worlds you have here.

reviews.review_title: Finally found what I’ve been looking for
reviews.review_description: Excellent combination of a full featured desktop building tool for VR app creation, web hosted content, and native oculus viewing app. Fairly priced with the extra bonus of these apps also working in browser and on mobile. Already having a great time teaching my 11 and 13 year old sons how to easily build anything they can imagine they want to play in VR. Thanks for creating such a flexible toolset!

Unfortunately I could not get my head round this the application needs tutorialssssssss sss it could be a player but it’s a bit uninviting it says build but where how ? It looks amazing but needs to guide people to help them!
